How many magic trees can you find inside the Gnome Stronghold?

On a scale of 1-10, how helpful is Logosia?
What is 3 to the power of 0?

How many coal rocks are around here?

How many Suqah inhabit Lunar isle?

How many types of dragon are there beneath the whirlpool's cavern?
How many pyre sites are found around this lake?
How many round tables can be found on this floor of the library?

coordinates.location: A hard level coordinate clue where the wrong type of wizard was spawning has now been fixed.

coordinates.coordinate: 12 June 2014(Update)
coordinates.location: Coordinate clues no longer require a chart, watch, or sextant in the player's inventory or bank in order to complete.

cryptic.clue: Always walking around the castle grounds and somehow knows everyone's age.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Hans walking around Lumbridge Castle.

cryptic.clue: Buried beneath the ground, who knows where it's found. Lucky for you, A man called Reldo may have a clue.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Reldo to receive a strange device used by Hot and Cold clues to locate the location of the next clue. Players can immediately start the search without speaking to Reldo if they already own a strange device.

cryptic.clue: In the place Duke Horacio calls home, talk to a man with a hat dropped by goblins.
cryptic.solution: Talk to the Cook in Lumbridge Castle.

cryptic.clue: In a village of barbarians, I am the one who guards the village from up high.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Hunding atop the tower on the east side of Barbarian Village.

cryptic.clue: Talk to Charlie the Tramp in Varrock.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Charlie the Tramp by the southern entrance to Varrock. He will give you a task.

cryptic.clue: Near the open desert I reside, to get past me you must abide. Go forward if you dare, for when you pass me, you'll be sweating by your hair.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Shantay at the Shantay Pass south of Al Kharid.

cryptic.clue: A crate found in the tower of a church is your next location.
cryptic.solution: Climb the ladder and search the crates on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] in the church in East Ardougne.

cryptic.clue: Belladonna, my dear. If only I had gloves, then I could hold you at last.
cryptic.solution: Talk to the Tool leprechaun at the Belladonna farming patch at Draynor Manor.

cryptic.clue: Dig at a waterfall by the pines in the serpent's shadow.
cryptic.solution: Dig in the flax field at Quetzacalli Gorge.

cryptic.clue: Dig between some ominous stones in Falador.
cryptic.solution: Three standing stones inside a walled area. East of Falador's northern gate.

cryptic.clue: Dig by the Giant's Den entrance, looking out over Lake Molch.
cryptic.solution: South-east of Lake Molch. Just south of the Shayzien rowboat, outside the dungeon entrance.

cryptic.clue: Dig in the centre of a great kingdom of 5 cities.
cryptic.solution: Dig in front of the large statue in the centre of Great Kourend.

cryptic.clue: Dig near some giant mushrooms, behind the Grand Tree.
cryptic.solution: Dig near the red mushrooms north-west of the Grand Tree's doors.

cryptic.clue: Dig outside the bank on Aldarin.
cryptic.solution: Dig west of the Aldarin bank.

cryptic.clue: Dig under Ithoi's cabin.
cryptic.solution: Dig under Ithoi the Navigator's cabin. Players who have not started The Corsair Curse quest may reach the location using a Charter Ship, via the Agility shortcut to the north (requires 10 ), or by spirit tree to Feldip Hills and running east.

cryptic.clue: Dig where only the skilled, the wealthy, or the brave can choose not to visit again.
cryptic.solution: Dig at the Lumbridge spawn (teleport area).

cryptic.clue: He's been studying unusual tree migrations.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Ranulph at the western end of Auburnvale.

cryptic.clue: I'd like to hear some music. Come and see me on the bridge in Falador Park, and play: <some music> Thanks, Cecilia
cryptic.solution: Speak to Cecilia on the bridge in Falador Park.

cryptic.clue: I wonder how many bronze swords he has handed out.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Vannaka in Edgeville Dungeon.

cryptic.clue: I would make a chemistry joke, but I'm afraid I wouldn't get a reaction.
cryptic.solution: Talk to the Chemist west of Rimmington's house portal.

cryptic.clue: I wouldn't wear this jean on my legs.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Father Jean in the Hosidius church.

cryptic.clue: Look in the ground floor crates of houses in Falador.
cryptic.solution: The house east of Falador east bank.

cryptic.clue: Monk's residence in the far west. See robe storage device.
cryptic.solution: Search the drawers in the south tent of the monk's camp found west of the Hosidius mine.

cryptic.clue: One of the sailors in Port Sarim is your next destination.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Captain Tobias on the docks of Port Sarim.

cryptic.clue: Salty peter.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Konoo who is digging saltpetre in Hosidius, east of the Woodcutting Guild.

cryptic.clue: Search a bookcase in Lumbridge swamp.
cryptic.solution: Located in Father Urhney's house.

cryptic.clue: Search a bookcase in the Wizards tower.
cryptic.solution: The bookcase located on the ground floor[UK]1st floor[US].

cryptic.clue: Search a wardrobe in Draynor.
cryptic.solution: Search the north wardrobe in Aggie's house.

cryptic.clue: Search the chest in Fred the Farmer's bedroom.
cryptic.solution: Search the chest by Fred the Farmer's bed in his house north-west of Lumbridge

cryptic.clue: Search chests found in the upstairs of shops in Port Sarim.
cryptic.solution: Search the east chest on the 2nd floor of Wydin's Food Store.

cryptic.clue: Search for a crate in a building in Hemenster.
cryptic.solution: House north of the Fishing Contest quest area, west of Grandpa Jack. Use the combat bracelet to teleport to the Ranging Guild to get there quickly.

cryptic.clue: Search for a crate in Varrock Castle.
cryptic.solution: Search the crate in the corner of the kitchen in Varrock Castle.

cryptic.clue: Search for a crate on the ground floor of a house in Seers' Village.
cryptic.solution: Search the crate in Phantuwti Fanstuwi Farsight's house, south of the pub in Seers' Village.

cryptic.clue: Search the bookcase in the monastery.
cryptic.solution: Search the south-eastern bookcase at Edgeville Monastery.

cryptic.clue: Search the food barrel at the top of the Hunter Guild.
cryptic.solution: Search the filled food pot at the top of the tree within the Hunter Guild, accessed from climbing the rope inside.

cryptic.clue: Search the eastern bookcase in Father Urhney's house.
cryptic.solution: Father Urhney's house is on the west side of Lumbridge Swamp.

cryptic.clue: Search the boxes in a shop in Taverley.
cryptic.solution: Search the box in Gaius' Two Handed Shop, south of Taverley's house portal.

cryptic.clue: Search the boxes in one of the tents in Al Kharid.
cryptic.solution: Search the crates in the tent east of the Silk trader.

cryptic.clue: Search the boxes in the goblin house near Lumbridge.
cryptic.solution: Lozar's house on the eastern side of the river.

cryptic.clue: Search the boxes in the house near the south entrance to Varrock.
cryptic.solution: The first house on the left when entering the city from the southern entrance.

cryptic.clue: Search the boxes just outside the Armour shop in East Ardougne.
cryptic.solution: Outside Zenesha's Plate Mail Body Shop.

cryptic.clue: Search the boxes of Falador's general store.
cryptic.solution: Falador General Store

cryptic.clue: Search the boxes next to a chest that needs a crystal key.
cryptic.solution: Crystal chest

cryptic.clue: Search the bucket in the Port Sarim jail.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Shantay at the Shantay Pass, ask what this place is, and identify yourself as an outlaw. After you're jailed, refuse to pay the 5gp fine twice and you'll be sent to the Port Sarim jail.

cryptic.clue: Search the bush at the digsite centre.
cryptic.solution: The bush is on the east side of the west pathway towards the Digsite from the Exam Centre.

cryptic.clue: Search the chest in Barbarian Village.
cryptic.solution: The chest located in the house with a .

cryptic.clue: Search the chest in the Duke of Lumbridge's bedroom.
cryptic.solution: The Duke's room is on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] in Lumbridge Castle.

cryptic.clue: Search the chest in the left-hand tower of Camelot Castle.
cryptic.solution: Located on the 2nd floor[UK]3rd floor[US] of the western tower of Camelot.

cryptic.clue: Search the chests in the Dwarven Mine.
cryptic.solution: The chest is on the western wall, where Hura's Crossbow Shop is, in the Dwarven Mine.

cryptic.clue: Search the chests upstairs in Al Kharid Palace.
cryptic.solution: The chest is located in the north-east corner on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US].

cryptic.clue: Search the Coffin in Edgeville.
cryptic.solution: Search the coffin located by the Wilderness teleport lever.

cryptic.clue: Search the crate in the left-hand tower of Lumbridge Castle.
cryptic.solution: Located on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] of the southern tower at the Lumbridge Castle entrance.

cryptic.clue: Search the crate in the Toad and Chicken pub.
cryptic.solution: The Toad and Chicken pub is located in Burthorpe.

cryptic.clue: Search the crate near a cart in Port Khazard.
cryptic.solution: Search by the southern Khazard General Store in Port Khazard.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in a bank in Varrock.
cryptic.solution: Search in the basement of the West Varrock bank.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in a house in Yanille that has a piano.
cryptic.solution: The house is located north-west of the bank.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in Canifis.
cryptic.solution: Search inside the shop, Rufus' Meat Emporium. Note: This step is only given if the player has completed Priest in Peril.[1]

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in Draynor Manor.
cryptic.solution: Top floor of the manor.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in East Ardougne's general store.
cryptic.solution: Located south of the Ardougne church.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in Falador General store.
cryptic.solution: The Falador General Store can be found by the northern entrance to the city.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in Horvik's armoury.
cryptic.solution: Horvik's in Varrock.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in the Barbarian Village helmet shop.
cryptic.solution: Peksa's Helmet Shop in Barbarian Village.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in the Dwarven mine.
cryptic.solution: Search the east of the Ice Mountain ladder entrance in the Drogo's Mining Emporium.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in the fruit store just east of the Hosidius town centre.
cryptic.solution: Search the crates in house containing fruit stalls.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in the guard house of the northern gate of East Ardougne.
cryptic.solution: The guard house is north-east of the Handelmort Mansion.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in the most north-western house in Al Kharid.
cryptic.solution: The house south-east of the gnome glider and the gem stall.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in the outhouse of the long building in Taverley.
cryptic.solution: Located in the small building attached by a fence to the main building. Climb over the stile.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in the Port Sarim Fishing shop.
cryptic.solution: Search the crates, by the door, in Gerrant's Fishy Business in Port Sarim.

cryptic.clue: Search the crate in Rommiks crafting shop in Rimmington.
cryptic.solution: The crates in Rommik's Crafty Supplies in Rimmington.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates in the shed just north of East Ardougne.
cryptic.solution: The crates in the shed north of the northern Ardougne bank.

cryptic.clue: Search the crates near a cart in Varrock.
cryptic.solution: South-east of Varrock Palace, south of the tree farming patch.

cryptic.clue: Search the single crate in Horvik's smithy in Varrock.
cryptic.solution: Horvik's Smithy is found north-east of Varrock Square.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers above Varrock's shops.
cryptic.solution: Located upstairs in Thessalia's Fine Clothes shop in Varrock.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers found upstairs in East Ardougne's houses.
cryptic.solution: Upstairs of the pub north of the Ardougne Castle.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers in a house in Draynor Village.
cryptic.solution: The drawer is located in the northernmost house in Draynor Village.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers in Catherby's Archery shop.
cryptic.solution: Hickton's Archery Emporium in Catherby.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers in Falador's chain mail shop.
cryptic.solution: Wayne's Chains - Chainmail Specialist store at the southern Falador walls.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers in one of Gertrude's bedrooms.
cryptic.solution: Kanel's bedroom (south-eastern room), outside of west Varrock.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers in the ground floor of a shop in Yanille.
cryptic.solution: Search the drawers in Yanille's hunting shop.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers in the house next to the Port Sarim mage shop.
cryptic.solution: House east of Betty's. Contains a cooking sink.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers in the upstairs of a house in Catherby.
cryptic.solution: Perdu's house in Catherby.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers of houses in Burthorpe.
cryptic.solution: Inside Hild's house in the north-east corner of Burthorpe.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers on the ground floor of a building facing Ardougne's Market.
cryptic.solution: Inside Noella's house north of the market.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers upstairs in Falador's shield shop.
cryptic.solution: The 2nd floor of Cassie's Shield Shop near Falador's north gates.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers upstairs in the bank to the East of Varrock.
cryptic.solution: East Varrock bank.

cryptic.clue: Search the drawers downstairs of houses in the eastern part of Falador.
cryptic.solution: House is located east of the eastern Falador bank and south of the fountain. The house is indicated by the icon on the minimap.

cryptic.clue: Search the open crate found in the Hosidius kitchens.
cryptic.solution: The Hosidius Kitchen is east of the mess in Hosidius.

cryptic.clue: Search the tents in the Imperial Guard camp in Burthorpe for some boxes.
cryptic.solution: Search in the tents in north-west corner of the camp.

cryptic.clue: Search the wheelbarrow in Rimmington mine.
cryptic.solution: The Rimmington mining site is located north of Rimmington.

cryptic.clue: Search through chests found in the upstairs of houses in eastern Falador.
cryptic.solution: The house is located south-west of the Falador Party Room. There are two chests in the room; search the northern chest.

cryptic.clue: Search through some drawers in the upstairs of a house in Rimmington.
cryptic.solution: On the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] of the house north of Hetty the Witch's house in Rimmington.

cryptic.clue: Search through some drawers found in Taverley's houses.
cryptic.solution: The south-eastern most house, south of Jatix's Herblore Shop.

cryptic.clue: Search upstairs in the houses of Seers' Village for some drawers.
cryptic.solution: Located in the house with the spinning wheel. South of the Seers' Village bank.

cryptic.clue: Someone watching the fights in the Emir's Arena is your next destination.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Jeed, found on the upper floor of the south east arena, at the Emir's Arena.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Arhein in Catherby.
cryptic.solution: Arhein is just south of the Catherby bank.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Doric, who lives north of Falador.
cryptic.solution: Doric is found north of Falador and east of the Taverley gate.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Ellis in Al Kharid.
cryptic.solution: Ellis is the tanner just north of the Al Kharid bank.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Gaius in Taverley.
cryptic.solution: Gaius is found in his shop in the north-west corner in Taverley, just south of Taverley's house portal.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Hans to solve the clue.
cryptic.solution: Hans can be found at Lumbridge Castle.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Jatix in Taverley.
cryptic.solution: Jatix is found in the middle of Taverley.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Ned in Draynor Village.
cryptic.solution: Ned is found north or the Draynor bank.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Rusty north of Falador.
cryptic.solution: Rusty can be found north-east of Falador on the way to the Mind Altar.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Sarah at Falador farm.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Sarah at Falador farm, north of Port Sarim.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Sir Kay in Camelot Castle.
cryptic.solution: Sir Kay can be found in the courtyard at Camelot Castle.

cryptic.clue: Speak to the bartender of the Blue Moon Inn in Varrock.
cryptic.solution: Talk to the bartender in Blue Moon Inn in Varrock.

cryptic.clue: Speak to the Lady of the Lake.
cryptic.solution: Talk to the Lady of the Lake in Taverley.

cryptic.clue: Speak to the staff of Sinclair mansion.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Louisa, on the ground floor[UK]1st floor[US], found at the Sinclair Mansion.

cryptic.clue: Strength potions with red spiders' eggs? He is quite a herbalist.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Apothecary in south-western Varrock. (The) Apothecary is just north-west of the Varrock Swordshop.

cryptic.clue: Surrounded by white walls and gems.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Herquin, the gem store owner in Falador.

cryptic.clue: Talk to Ali the Leaflet Dropper north of the Al Kharid mine.
cryptic.solution: Ali the Leaflet Dropper can be found roaming north of the Al Kharid mine.

cryptic.clue: Talk to Ambassador Spanfipple in the White Knights Castle.
cryptic.solution: Ambassador Spanfipple can be found roaming on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] of the White Knights' Castle.

cryptic.clue: Talk to a party-goer in Falador.
cryptic.solution: Lucy is the bartender on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] of the Party Room.

cryptic.clue: Talk to Cassie in Falador.
cryptic.solution: Cassie is found just south-east of the northern Falador gate.

cryptic.clue: Talk to Charles at Port Piscarilius.
cryptic.solution: Charles is found by Veos' ship in Port Piscarilius.

cryptic.clue: Talk to the cook in the Blue Moon Inn in Varrock.
cryptic.solution: The Blue Moon Inn can be found by the southern entrance to Varrock.

cryptic.clue: Talk to Ermin.
cryptic.solution: Ermin can be found on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] of the tree house south-east of the Gnome Agility Course.

cryptic.clue: Talk to the barber in the Falador barber shop.
cryptic.solution: The Hairdresser can be found in the barber shop, north of the west Falador bank.

cryptic.clue: Talk to the bartender of the Rusty Anchor in Port Sarim.
cryptic.solution: The Bartender can be found in the Rusty Anchor Inn, which is located in the northern part of Port Sarim.

cryptic.clue: Talk to the Doomsayer.
cryptic.solution: The Doomsayer can be found just north of Lumbridge Castle entrance.

cryptic.clue: Talk to Morgan in his house at Draynor Village.
cryptic.solution: Morgan can be found in the house with the map icon.

cryptic.clue: Talk to the mother of a basement dwelling son.
cryptic.solution: Evil Dave's mother, Doris, is located in the house west of Edgeville bank.

cryptic.clue: Talk to the Squire in the White Knights' castle in Falador.
cryptic.solution: The Squire is located in the courtyard of the White Knights' Castle.

cryptic.clue: Talk to Turael in Burthorpe.
cryptic.solution: Turael is located in the small house east of The Toad and Chicken inn.

cryptic.clue: Talk to Wayne at Wayne's Chains in Falador.
cryptic.solution: Wayne's shop is found directly south of the White Knights' Castle.

cryptic.clue: Talk to Zeke in Al Kharid.
cryptic.solution: Zeke is the owner of the scimitar shop in Al Kharid.

cryptic.clue: Thanks, Grandma!
cryptic.solution: Tynan can be found in the north-east corner of Port Piscarilius.

cryptic.clue: The hand ain't listening.
cryptic.solution: Talk to The Face located by the manhole just north of the Port Sarim fishing shop.

cryptic.clue: A graceful man of many colours, his crates must be full of many delights.
cryptic.solution: Kill a hill giant to obtain the key. Search the crate on the 2nd floor[UK]3rd floor[US] of Osten's shop in Shayzien.

cryptic.clue: A town with a different sort of night-life is your destination. Search for some crates in one of the houses.
cryptic.solution: Search the crate inside of the clothes shop in Canifis. (fairy ring code CKS)

cryptic.clue: Are you somewhat entertained?
cryptic.solution: Speak to Gloria inside the Fortis Colosseum.

cryptic.clue: Find a crate close to the monks that like to paaarty!
cryptic.solution: The crate is in the east side of the Kandarin Monastery, which is south of Ardougne and where Brother Omad is found.

cryptic.clue: Go to the village being attacked by trolls, search the drawers in one of the houses.
cryptic.solution: Go to Dunstan's house in the north-east corner of Burthorpe. Kill Penda in The Toad and Chicken to obtain the key.

cryptic.clue: Go to this building to be illuminated, and check the drawers while you are there.
cryptic.solution: The 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] of the Lighthouse (fairy ring code ALP). Kill a Rellekka marketplace guard to obtain the key. (Note: Starting the Horror from the Deep quest and speaking to Gunnjorn to obtain the Lighthouse key is required! Level 35 Agility is required to talk to Gunnjorn. You must also repair the bridge with two wooden planks, a hammer and 60 steel nails.)

cryptic.clue: I'd like to hear some music. Come and see me on the bridge in Falador Park, and play: <some music> Thanks, Cecilia
cryptic.solution: Speak to Cecilia, who is located on the bridge in Falador Park.

cryptic.clue: In a town where everyone has perfect vision, seek some locked drawers in a house that sits opposite a workshop.
cryptic.solution: The drawers is in Seers' Village in the house south of the Elemental Workshop entrance. Kill any chicken to obtain a key. (Note: The closest chicken is just by the entrance of the Ranging Guild, west of Seers' Village.)

cryptic.clue: In a town where the guards are armed with maces, search the upstairs rooms of the Public House.
cryptic.solution: Search the drawers in the pub north of Ardougne Castle. Kill a guard dog at Handelmort Mansion to obtain the key.

cryptic.clue: In a town where thieves steal from stalls, search for some drawers in the upstairs of a house near the bank.
cryptic.solution: Kill any guard located around East Ardougne for a medium key. Then, search the drawers in the upstairs hallway of Jerico's house, which is the house with pigeon cages located south of the northern East Ardougne bank.

cryptic.clue: In a town where wizards are known to gather, search upstairs in a large house to the north.
cryptic.solution: Travel to Yanille and head to the house north-west of the bank. Kill a man nearby to receive a key. Go upstairs in the house and search the chest.

cryptic.clue: In a village made of bamboo, look for some crates under one of the houses.
cryptic.solution: Search the crate by the house at the northern point of the broken jungle fence in Tai Bwo Wannai.

cryptic.clue: Probably filled with wizards socks.
cryptic.solution: Kill one of the wizards for the key. Search the drawers in the basement of the Wizards' Tower south of Draynor Village. (fairy ring code DIS)

cryptic.clue: Search the basket of apples in an orchard, south of the unknown grave surrounded by white roses.
cryptic.solution: It's in the orchard north-west of Hosidius.

cryptic.clue: Search the crate abandoned in the shadow of a mountain's grace.
cryptic.solution: Search the crate inside the lone building in the Gloomthorn Trail.

cryptic.clue: Search the upstairs drawers of a house in a village where pirates are known to have a good time.
cryptic.solution: The house in the south-east corner of Brimhaven, north-east of Davon's Amulet Store. Kill any pirate located around Brimhaven to obtain the key.

cryptic.clue: Speak to a referee.
cryptic.solution: Talk to a Gnome ball referee found on the Gnome Ball field in the Gnome Stronghold. You will receive a challenge scroll that you have to answer. Answer: 5096

cryptic.clue: Speak to Donovan, the Family Handyman.
cryptic.solution: Donovan the Family Handyman is found on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] of Sinclair Mansion.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Hajedy.
cryptic.solution: Hajedy is found by the cart, located just south of the Brimhaven docks.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Kangai Mau.
cryptic.solution: Kangai Mau is found in the Shrimp and Parrot in Brimhaven.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Roavar.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Roavar in the Canifis tavern.

cryptic.clue: Speak to Uglug Nar.
cryptic.solution: Uglug Nar is an ogre shaman outside of Jiggig, south of Castle Wars. You will receive a challenge scroll that you have to answer. Answer: 6859

cryptic.clue: Speak to Ulizius.
cryptic.solution: Ulizius is the monk who guards the gate into Mort Myre Swamp. (fairy ring code CKS)

cryptic.clue: The dead, red dragon watches over this chest. He must really dig the view.
cryptic.solution: Search the chest underneath the Red Dragon's head in the Exam Centre. Kill a barbarian in Barbarian Village, Barbarian Outpost or the Blue Moon Inn to receive the key.

cryptic.clue: This crate holds a better reward than a broken arrow.
cryptic.solution: Inside the Ranging Guild. Search the crate behind the northern most building.

cryptic.clue: This crate is mine, all mine, even if it is in the middle of the desert.
cryptic.solution: Centre of the Desert Mining Camp. Search the crates. Requires the metal key from The Tourist Trap to enter.

cryptic.clue: Try not to step on any aquatic nasties while searching this crate.
cryptic.solution: Search the crate in Bailey's house on the Fishing Platform.

cryptic.clue: You'll need to look for a town with a central fountain. Look for a locked chest in the town's chapel.
cryptic.solution: Search the chest by the stairs in the Varrock church, east of the palace. Kill a monk in Ardougne Monastery to obtain the key.

cryptic.clue: 46 is my number. My body is the colour of burnt orange and crawls among those with eight. Three mouths I have, yet I cannot eat. My blinking blue eye hides my grave.
cryptic.solution: Dig on top of the sapphire spawn in the Spiders' nest in level 46 Wilderness (north-west of Lava Dragon Isle).

cryptic.clue: 'A bag belt only?', he asked his balding brothers.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Abbot Langley in the monastery near Edgeville.

cryptic.clue: A general who sets a 'shining' example.
cryptic.solution: Speak to General Hining found at Tyras Camp.

cryptic.clue: A great view - watch the rapidly drying hides get splashed. Check the box you are sitting on.
cryptic.solution: Almera's house north of Baxtorian Falls, search the boxes on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US].

cryptic.clue: Aggie I see, Lonely and southern I feel I am neither inside nor outside the house yet no house would be complete without me. The treasure lies beneath me!
cryptic.solution: Dig outside the window of Aggie the Witch's house in Draynor Village.

cryptic.clue: AIQ 0440
cryptic.solution: Dig 4 steps east and 4 steps south of the centre of the fairy ring AIQ (Mudskipper Point).

cryptic.clue: AIR 2331
cryptic.solution: Dig 2 steps east and 1 step south of the centre of the fairy ring AIR.

cryptic.clue: AJP 3015
cryptic.solution: Dig 2 steps north and 5 steps west of the centre of the fairy ring AJP.

cryptic.clue: ALP 1140
cryptic.solution: Dig 1 step east and 3 steps south of the centre of the fairy ring ALP near the Lighthouse.

cryptic.clue: And so on, and so on, and so on. Walking from the land of many unimportant things leads to a choice of paths.
cryptic.solution: Dig on Etceteria next to the evergreen tree in front of the castle walls.

cryptic.clue: BIP 7013
cryptic.solution: Dig 6 steps north and 3 steps west of the centre of the fairy ring BIP (Fairytale II - Cure a Queen or 50 Agility required).

cryptic.clue: BJR 1123
cryptic.solution: Dig 1 steps south and 2 steps west of the centre of the fairy ring BJR. Partial completion of the Holy Grail quest is required to enter this area.

cryptic.clue: BLP 6200
cryptic.solution: Dig 6 steps north and 2 steps east of the centre of the fairy ring BLP.

cryptic.clue: CIS 0009
cryptic.solution: Dig 9 steps west of the centre of the fairy ring (code CIS) found north of the Arceuus Library. Alternatively, teleport to Arceuus and run north, or use a games necklace to teleport to the Wintertodt camp and run south.

cryptic.clue: Citric cellar.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Heckel Funch on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] in the Grand Tree.

cryptic.clue: CKP 0224
cryptic.solution: Dig 2 steps south and 2 steps west of the centre of the fairy ring CKP.

cryptic.clue: Come have a cip with this great soot covered denizen.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Miner Magnus east of the fairy ring (code CIP). Answer: 8

cryptic.clue: Come to the evil ledge, Yew know yew want to. Try not to get stung.
cryptic.solution: Dig in Edgeville, just east of the southern yew tree.

cryptic.clue: Covered in shadows, the centre of the circle is where you will find the answer.
cryptic.solution: Dig in the centre of Mort'ton, where the roads intersect. Just south of Razmire Keelgan.

cryptic.clue: Dig in the lair of red wings, within the temple of the Sun and moon.
cryptic.solution: Dig in the red dragons room of Forthos dungeon.

cryptic.clue: Dig where 4 siblings and I all live with our evil overlord.
cryptic.solution: Dig in the chicken pen inside the Champions' Guild. Requires 32 quest points to enter.

cryptic.clue: DIP 8511
cryptic.solution: Dig 7 steps north and 4 steps east of the centre of the fairy ring DIP (Abyssal Nexus).

cryptic.clue: DKS 2310
cryptic.solution: Dig 1 step north and 3 steps east of the centre of the fairy ring DKS (north-east of Rellekka).

cryptic.clue: Four blades I have, yet draw no blood; Still I turn my prey to powder. If you are brave, come search my roof; It is there my blades are louder.
cryptic.solution: Lumbridge windmill, search the crates on the top floor.

cryptic.clue: Generally speaking, his nose was very bent.
cryptic.solution: Talk to General Bentnoze, found in the northernmost part of Goblin Village; he'll give you a puzzle box.

cryptic.clue: Gold I see, yet gold I require. Give me 875 if death you desire.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Saniboch at the Brimhaven Dungeon entrance.

cryptic.clue: He knows just how easy it is to lose track of time.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Brother Kojo in the Clock Tower. Answer: 22.

cryptic.clue: His head might be hollow, but the crates nearby are filled with surprises.
cryptic.solution: Search the crates near the Clay golem in the Ruins of Uzer.

cryptic.clue: I'd like to hear some music. Come and see me on the bridge in Falador Park, and play: <some music> Thanks, Cecilia
cryptic.solution: Speak to Cecilia, who is located on the bridge in Falador Park.

cryptic.clue: I am a token of the greatest love. I have no beginning or end. My eye is red, I can fit like a glove. Go to the place where it's money they lend, And dig by the gate to be my friend.
cryptic.solution: Dig by the gate in the basement of the West Varrock bank.

cryptic.clue: I have many arms but legs, I have just one. I have little family but my seed you can grow on, I am not dead, yet I am but a spirit, and my power, on your quests, you will earn the right to free it.
cryptic.solution: Spirit tree in Tree Gnome Village. Answer: 13112221

cryptic.clue: I lie lonely and forgotten in mid wilderness, where the dead rise from their beds. Feel free to quarrel and wind me up and dig while you shoot their heads.
cryptic.solution: Directly under the crossbow respawn in the Graveyard of Shadows in level 18 Wilderness.

cryptic.clue: I sit on the beach and cry for those that have passed on.
cryptic.solution: Dig on the beach of the Tear of the Soul.

cryptic.clue: I watch the sea. I watch you fish. I watch your tree.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Ellena at Catherby fruit tree patch.

cryptic.clue: Identify the back of this over-acting brother. (He's a long way from home.)
cryptic.solution: Talk to Hamid, the monk at the altar in the Emir's Arena hospital. You will receive a puzzle box.

cryptic.clue: If a man carried my burden, he would break his back. I am not rich, but leave silver in my track. Speak to the keeper of my trail.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Gerrant in the fish shop in Port Sarim.

cryptic.clue: If you look closely enough, it seems that the archers have lost more than their needles.
cryptic.solution: Search the haystack by the south corner of the Ranging Guild. You need level 40 Ranged to access it.

cryptic.clue: In the city where merchants are said to have lived, talk to a man with a splendid cape, but a hat dropped by goblins.
cryptic.solution: Talk to the head chef in Cooks' Guild west of Varrock. Remember to wear a Chef's Hat or Varrock armour 3 and above.

cryptic.clue: It seems to have reached the end of the line, and it's still empty.
cryptic.solution: Search the carts in the northern part of the Dwarven Mine.

cryptic.clue: Leader of the Yak City.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Mawnis Burowgar in Neitiznot. The Fremennik Isles quest upto the jester part or a silly jester costume is required.

cryptic.clue: Mine was the strangest birth under the sun. I left the crimson sack, yet life had not begun. Entered the world, and yet was seen by none.
cryptic.solution: Inside Karamja Volcano, dig directly underneath the red spiders' eggs respawn.

cryptic.clue: Must be full of railings.
cryptic.solution: Search the boxes around the hut where the broken dwarf cannon is, close to the start of the Dwarf Cannon quest (north-west of the Fishing Guild).

cryptic.clue: My giant guardians below the market streets would be fans of rock and roll, if only they could grab hold of it. Dig near my green bubbles!
cryptic.solution: Dig near the cauldron by moss giants under Varrock Sewers. A slash weapon or knife is required to navigate through the sewers. Players with 51 Agility can use the shortcut pipe from Edgeville Dungeon to direct access the clue location; a slash weapon or knife is not required in this case.

cryptic.clue: My home is grey, and made of stone; A castle with a search for a meal. Hidden in some drawers I am, across from a wooden wheel.
cryptic.solution: Open the drawers inside the room with the spinning wheel on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] of Lumbridge Castle.

cryptic.clue: My name is like a tree, yet it is spelt with a 'g'. Come see the fur which is right near me.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Wilough, next to the fur merchant in Varrock Square.

cryptic.clue: Often sought out by scholars of histories past, find me where words of wisdom speak volumes.
cryptic.solution: Speak to an examiner at the Exam Centre. You might need to talk to several different examiners.

cryptic.clue: Probably filled with books on magic.
cryptic.solution: Search the bookcase in the basement of Wizards' Tower.

cryptic.clue: Read 'How to breed scorpions.' By O.W.Thathurt.
cryptic.solution: Search the northern bookcase on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] of the Sorcerer's Tower.

cryptic.clue: Rotting next to a ditch. Dig next to the fish.
cryptic.solution: Dig next to a fishing spot on the south-east side of Burgh de Rott.

cryptic.clue: 'Small shoe.' Often found with rod on mushroom.
cryptic.solution: Talk to any Gnome trainer in the Agility area of the Tree Gnome Stronghold.

cryptic.clue: Snah? I feel all confused, like one of those cakes...
cryptic.solution: Talk to Hans roaming around Lumbridge Castle. (Walk anti-clockwise around castle to meet Hans quicker.)

cryptic.clue: Surprising? I bet he is...
cryptic.solution: Talk to Sir Prysin in Varrock Palace.

cryptic.clue: Surviving.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Sir Vyvin on the 2nd floor[UK]3rd floor[US] of Falador Castle (east side).

cryptic.clue: The beasts to my east snap claws and tails, The rest to my west can slide and eat fish. The force to my north will jump and they'll wail, Come dig by my fire and make a wish.
cryptic.solution: Dig by the torch in the Ardougne Zoo, between the penguins and the scorpions.

cryptic.clue: The Big High War God left his mark on this place.
cryptic.solution: Dig anywhere in Yu'biusk (fairy ring BLQ after completion of Land of the Goblins).

cryptic.clue: The cheapest water for miles around, but they react badly to religious icons.
cryptic.solution: Search the crates in the General Store tent in the Bandit Camp, south of the Bedabin Camp.

cryptic.clue: The effects of this fire are magnified.
cryptic.solution: Dig by the fire beside Ket'sal K'uk in the westernmost part of the Kebos Swamp.

cryptic.clue: The keeper of Melzars...Spare? Skeleton? Anar?
cryptic.solution: Speak to Oziach in Edgeville.

cryptic.clue: The King's magic shouldn't be wasted by me.
cryptic.solution: Talk to the Guardian mummy inside the Pyramid Plunder minigame in Sophanem. Partial completion of Icthlarin's Little Helper is required. The mummy will only be found in one of the four entrances, this might require players to check the other entrances.

cryptic.clue: The magic of 4 colours, an early experience you could learn. The large beast caged up top, rages, as his demised kin's loot now returns.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Wizard Mizgog at the top of the Wizards' Tower south of Draynor. Fairy ring code DIS takes you to the wizard's tower. The Amulet of the eye allows easy access to the wizard tower basement, use it to teleport to the Temple of the Eye and then leave via the portal.

cryptic.clue: The mother of the reptilian sacrifice.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Zul-Cheray in a house near the sacrificial boat at Zul-Andra. Use fairy ring code BJS, treading on stepping stones (requiring 76 Agility) then walk east.

cryptic.clue: THEY'RE EVERYWHERE!!!! But they were here first. Dig for treasure where the ground is rich with ore.
cryptic.solution: Dig at Barbarian Village, next to the Stronghold of Security.

cryptic.clue: This aviator is at the peak of his profession.
cryptic.solution: Captain Bleemadge, the gnome glider pilot, is found at the top of White Wolf Mountain.

cryptic.clue: This village has a problem with cartloads of the undead. Try checking the bookcase to find an answer.
cryptic.solution: Search the bookcase by the doorway of the building just south-east of the Shilo Village Gem Mine.

cryptic.clue: Try not to let yourself be dazzled when you search these drawers.
cryptic.solution: Search the western drawers in Jimmy Dazzler's home near the East Ardougne Rat Pits.

cryptic.clue: When no weapons are at hand, then is the time to reflect. In Saradomin's name, redemption draws closer...
cryptic.solution: On Entrana, search the southern drawer in the house with the cooking range on the western side of the island.

cryptic.clue: When you get tired of fighting, go deep, deep down until you need an antidote.
cryptic.solution: Go to Yanille Agility dungeon and fall into the place with the poison spiders, either by repeatedly walking across the balancing ledge (level 40 Agility required) or praying at the altar of Zamorak. Search the crate by the stairs leading up. Note: Falling by praying at the altar will result in 15 unavoidable damage. Falling from the ledge results in significantly less (around 3 or 4).

cryptic.clue: Where the best are commemorated, and a celebratory cup, not just for beer.
cryptic.solution: Dig at the Clan Cup Trophy south-west of the Citharede Abbey.

cryptic.clue: You have all of the elements available to solve this clue. Fortunately you do not have to go as far as to stand in a draft.
cryptic.solution: Requirements: Started Elemental Workshop I Search the crate, just west of the Air elementals, inside the Elemental Workshop. Note: A battered key is required to enter to workshop.

cryptic.clue: You will need to under-cook to solve this one.
cryptic.solution: Search the crate in the Lumbridge basement.

cryptic.clue: A demon's best friend holds the next step of this clue.
cryptic.solution: Kill a hellhound. Note: Killing Cerberus will count, but hellhounds inside the God Wars Dungeon will not count.

cryptic.clue: A Guthixian ring lies between two peaks. Search the stones and you'll find what you seek.
cryptic.solution: Search the stones several steps west of the Guthixian stone circle in Taverley, search the stones.

cryptic.clue: A reck you say; let's pray there aren't any ghosts.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Father Aereck in Lumbridge.

cryptic.clue: A ring of water surrounds 4 powerful rings, dig above the ladder located there.
cryptic.solution: Dig by the ladder leading to the Dagannoth Kings' room in the Waterbirth Island Dungeon.

cryptic.clue: Banish a chilling spirit.
cryptic.solution: Kill a Frost Nagua. Amoxliatl also counts for this.

cryptic.clue: Crush the spirited earth.
cryptic.solution: Kill an Earthen Nagua.

cryptic.clue: Desert insects is what I see. Taking care of them was my responsibility. Your solution is found by digging near me.
cryptic.solution: Dig next to the entomologist, in the Kalphite Cave east of Shantay Pass.

cryptic.clue: Dig under Razorlor's toad batta.
cryptic.solution: Dig on the toad batta spawn in Tarn's Lair. See this map for directions. From the entrance, follow the route C-K, or, alternatively, D-S-Q-P-O-N-M-L. Or faster: from the Slayer ring teleport, east, jump west past mages, get pushed by wall crushers, south, south, west, west, south, search the tile (floor) to deactivate the log trap and jump over, south, south, "go down", but you'll fall right where the toad batta is.

cryptic.clue: Dig where the forces of Zamorak and Saradomin collide.
cryptic.solution: Dig next to the law rift in the Abyss, in the north-east section.

cryptic.clue: Dobson is my last name, and with gardening I seek fame.
cryptic.solution: Horacio, located in the garden of the Handelmort Mansion in East Ardougne.

cryptic.clue: Does one really need a fire to stay warm here?
cryptic.solution: Located next to the fire near the Volcanic Mine entrance on the Fossil Island Volcano.

cryptic.clue: Even the seers say this clue goes right over their heads.
cryptic.solution: Search the crate on the Seers' Village Rooftop Course. Requires 60 Agility (can be boosted from 55 with a Summer pie).

cryptic.clue: Ghostly bones.
cryptic.solution: Kill an Ankou, which can be found on the 4th level of Stronghold of Security, the Stronghold Slayer Cave (Slayer task required), the Catacombs of Kourend, and The Forgotten Cemetery.

cryptic.clue: Green is the colour of my death as the winter-guise, I swoop towards the ground.
cryptic.solution: Required: , partial completion of Troll Romance. Players need to slide down to where Trollweiss grows on Trollweiss Mountain.

cryptic.clue: Has no one told you it is rude to ask a lady her age?
cryptic.solution: Speak to Mawrth in Lletya

cryptic.clue: His bark is worse than his bite.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Barker at Canifis's Barkers' Haberdashery.

cryptic.clue: I am the one who watches the giants. The giants in turn watch me. I watch with two while they watch with one. Come seek where I may be.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Kamfreena on the top floor of the Warriors' Guild.

cryptic.clue: I burn between heroes and legends.
cryptic.solution: Speak to the candle maker in Catherby.

cryptic.clue: I live in a deserted crack collecting soles.
cryptic.solution: Enter the crack west of Nardah rug merchant, and talk to the genie. A rope and a lightsource are required (partial completion of Spirits of the Elid required).

cryptic.clue: In a while...
cryptic.solution: Kill a crocodile.

cryptic.clue: Let's hope you don't meet a watery death when you encounter this fiend.
cryptic.solution: Kill a waterfiend. Players cannot kill those found in the Kraken Cove as part of this clue.

cryptic.clue: Mix yellow with blue and add heat, make sure you bring protection.
cryptic.solution: Kill a green dragon or brutal green dragon. Players who have completed Dragon Slayer II can use the Myths' Guild basement to kill green dragons outside the Wilderness.

cryptic.clue: More resources than I can handle, but in a very dangerous area. Can't wait to strike gold!
cryptic.solution: Dig in the centre of the three gold rocks in the Resource Area deep in the Wilderness. An entry fee of 7,500 coins is required (6,000 if the medium Wilderness Diary is completed, 3,750 if the hard diary is completed, or free if the elite diary is completed).

cryptic.clue: Observing someone in a swamp, under the telescope lies treasure.
cryptic.solution: Dig by the telescope in the island where Broken Handz can be found (fairy ring code DLR).

cryptic.clue: Reflection is the weakness for these eyes of evil.
cryptic.solution: Kill a basilisk, which requires a mirror shield and 40 Slayer. Basilisk knights also count, requiring 60 Slayer and completion of The Fremennik Exiles.

cryptic.clue: Right on the blessed border, cursed by the evil ones. On the spot inaccessible by both; I will be waiting. The bugs' imminent possession holds the answer.
cryptic.solution: Dig right under the fairy ring located west of Filliman's grotto. The fairy ring code is BIP. Players without access to fairy ring transport can use the shortcut to get to the island provided they have 50 Agility.

cryptic.clue: Scattered coins and gems fill the floor. The chest you seek is in the north east.
cryptic.solution: Kill the King Black Dragon for a key (elite), and then open the closed chest in the north-east corner of the lair.

cryptic.clue: 'See you in your dreams' said the vegetable man.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Dominic Onion at the Nightmare Zone teleport spot.

cryptic.clue: Show this to Sherlock.
cryptic.solution: Sherlock can be found south of Seers' Village. Players will have to perform one of the Sherlock tasks in order to complete this challenge.

cryptic.clue: Speak to a Wyse man.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Wyson the gardener at Falador Park.

cryptic.clue: Surround my bones in fire, on top the wooden pyre. Finally lay me to rest, before my one last test.
cryptic.solution: Kill a confused barbarian or lost barbarian within the Ancient Cavern to receive mangled bones. Construct a pyre ship and burn the bones onto the pyre with logs, a tinderbox, and an axe. Kill the ferocious barbarian spirit that spawns to receive the next clue.

cryptic.clue: The beasts retreat, for their Queen is gone; the song of this town still plays on. Dig near the birthplace of a blade, be careful not to melt your spade.
cryptic.solution: (Requires full completion of the Swan Song quest. There is no need to accept the reward though!) Dig in front of the small furnace in the Piscatoris Fishing Colony.

cryptic.clue: Their bane awaits, but don't be going in there without permission.
cryptic.solution: Kill the shellbane gryphon. A gryphon Slayer task is not required to complete the clue step.

cryptic.clue: Three rule below and three sit at top. Come dig at my entrance.
cryptic.solution: Dig in front of the entrance to the Waterbirth Island Dungeon.

cryptic.clue: Varrock is where I reside, not the land of the dead, but I am so old, I should be there instead. Let's hope your reward is as good as it says, just 1 gold one and you can have it read.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Aris, west of Varrock Square.

cryptic.clue: With a name like that, you'd expect a little more than just a few scimitars.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Daga on Ape Atoll. Note: If Monkey Madness II has not been completed, you must be wielding any Monkey Greegree to speak to Daga. Either way, you do NOT need a M'speak amulet

cryptic.clue: W marks the spot.
cryptic.solution: Dig in the middle of the Warriors' Guild entrance hall. To enter, a player must have their Attack and Strength levels add up to a total of 130 or have either one equal to 99.

cryptic.clue: With drinks and dwarves I make my way, upon my head a glass will stay.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Funbo in The Lost Pickaxe pub in Cam Torum.

cryptic.clue: You'll get licked.
cryptic.solution: Kill a bloodveld. Mutated variants do work. Bloodvelds in the God Wars Dungeon do work.

cryptic.clue: You'll have to plug your nose if you use this source of herbs.
cryptic.solution: Kill an aberrant spectre or deviant spectre and pick up the clue or casket that it drops.

cryptic.clue: You might have to turn over a few stones to progress.
cryptic.solution: Kill a rock crab and pick up the casket or clue that it drops.

cryptic.clue: You must be 100 to play with me.
cryptic.solution: Speak to the Veteran boat squire at Pest Control.

cryptic.clue: You were 3 and I was the 6th. Come speak to me.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Vannaka in Edgeville Dungeon.

cryptic.clue: You will have to fly high where a sword cannot help you.
cryptic.solution: Kill an aviansie.

cryptic.clue: 2 musical birds. Dig in front of the spinning light.
cryptic.solution: Dig in front of the spinning light in Ping and Pong's room inside the Iceberg. A clockwork suit is required to enter the iceberg.

cryptic.clue: A chisel and hammer reside in his home, strange for one of magic. Impress him with your magical equipment.
cryptic.solution: Wizard Cromperty at the north-east corner of East Ardougne. Speak to him while wearing equipment adding up to at least +100 in magical attack bonus. The passive magic attack multiplication effect of Tumeken's shadow does not count towards the +100 requirement, but its base magic attack bonus of +35 will.

cryptic.clue: A dwarf, approaching death, but very much in the light.
cryptic.solution: Thorgel at the entrance to the Death Altar. Requires partial completion of Mourning's End Part II. Easily reached by entering the Death Altar via the Abyss and then leaving.

cryptic.clue: A massive battle rages beneath so be careful when you dig by the large broken crossbow.
cryptic.solution: North-east of the God Wars Dungeon entrance, climb the rocky handholds and dig by the large crossbow.

cryptic.clue: Anger Abbot Langley.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Abbot Langley while you have a negative prayer bonus (currently only possible with an Ancient staff or an Ancient sceptre).

cryptic.clue: Anger those who adhere to Saradomin's edicts to prevent travel.
cryptic.solution: Port Sarim docks, try to charter a ship to Entrana with armour or weapons equipped.

cryptic.clue: Buried beneath the ground, who knows where it's found. Lucky for you, A man called Jorral may have a clue.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Jorral to receive a strange device, which works similarly to the enchanted key (must have Making History quest completed). For a list of all possible locations, see here.

cryptic.clue: Come brave adventurer, your sense is on fire. If you talk to me, it's an old god you desire.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Viggora. Note that he can be found (is visible) in 3 locations, but you can only speak to (and continue the clue) the version of him that you spoke to during Curse of the Empty Lord miniquest. You can check your quest log to find out which location. Paddewwa, Edgeville Dungeon, near the earth warriors. 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] of the Rogues' Castle in the deep Wilderness. 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] of the Canifis Slayer Tower, just before the Infernal Mage. A ring of visibility or a ring of shadows and ghostspeak amulet are required to make progress through the clue.

cryptic.clue: Darkness wanders around me, but fills my mind with knowledge.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Biblia on the Arceuus Library's top floor.

cryptic.clue: Dig in front of the icy arena where 1 of 4 was fought.
cryptic.solution: Where you fought Kamil from Desert Treasure I, dig north-east of the first small rock just past the wolves.

cryptic.clue: Faint sounds of 'Arr', fire giants found deep, the eastern tip of a lake, are the rewards you could reap.
cryptic.solution: Dig south of the pillar at the end of the Deep Wilderness Dungeon.

cryptic.clue: Falo the bard wants to see you.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Falo the Bard, who is located on the road to the Fremennik Province.

cryptic.clue: Elvish onions.
cryptic.solution: Dig in the onion patch east of the allotment patches in the east part of Prifddinas. Requires completion of Song of the Elves.

cryptic.clue: Fiendish cooks probably won't dig the dirty dishes.
cryptic.solution: Dig by the fire in the Rogues' Den.

cryptic.clue: The doorman of the Warriors' Guild wishes to be impressed by how strong your equipment is.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Ghommal (or Laidee Gnonock after While Guthix Sleeps) with a total Melee Strength bonus of 100 or more. (Note: Amulet of strength gives +10, even better than a fury for this clue. A dragon battleaxe gives +85 and is relatively easy to obtain for earlier-game players. A Godsword or Barrelchest anchor on its own is over 100 Strength bonus.)

cryptic.clue: Great demons, dragons, and spiders protect this blue rock, beneath which, you may find what you seek.
cryptic.solution: Dig by the runite rock in the Lava Maze Dungeon.

cryptic.clue: Guthix left his mark in a fiery lake, dig at the tip of it.
cryptic.solution: Dig at the tip of the lava lake that is shaped like a Guthixian symbol, west of the Mage Arena.

cryptic.clue: Here, there are tears, but nobody is crying. Speak to the guardian and show off your alignment to balance.
cryptic.solution: Talk to Juna while wearing three Guthix-affiliated items. All Void Knight equipment is Guthix-affiliated.

cryptic.clue: Hopefully this set of armour will help you to keep surviving.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Sir Vyvin while wearing white platebody and white platelegs/white plateskirt (white full helm is not needed).

cryptic.clue: If you're feeling brave, dig beneath the dragon's eye.
cryptic.solution: Dig below the mossy rock under the Viyeldi caves. Requires progress or completion of Legends' Quest. If the quest has not been completed, a bravery potion and rope is required. If the player has 91 Agility[boostable], they can purchase a long rope from the Darkmeyer General Store and attach it to rocks and use it to avoid having to navigate the perilous slope. If the player does not have 96 Agility[boostable], a pickaxe, a lockpick, unpowered orb, 3 cosmic runes and 30 elemental runes of one type are additionally required to enter the Viyeldi caves.

cryptic.clue: I lie beneath the first descent to the holy encampment.
cryptic.solution: Dig immediately after climbing down the first set of rocks towards Saradomin's Encampment within the God Wars Dungeon. Two ropes are needed; one to enter the dungeon and another to enter Saradomin's Encampment (not required if you've used once before already). 70 Agility is also required (cannot be boosted).

cryptic.clue: My life was spared but these voices remain, now guarding these iron gates is my bane.
cryptic.solution: Speak to the Key Master in Cerberus' Lair.

cryptic.clue: One of several rhyming brothers, in business attire with an obsession for paper work.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Piles in the Resource Area. An entry fee of 7,500 coins is required (6,000 if the medium Wilderness Diary is completed, 3,750 if the hard diary is completed, or free if the elite diary is completed).

cryptic.clue: Pentagrams and demons, burnt bones and remains, I wonder what the blood contains.
cryptic.solution: Dig under the blood rune spawn next to the Demonic Ruins.

cryptic.clue: Robin wishes to see your finest ranged equipment.
cryptic.solution: Robin at the inn in Port Phasmatys. Speak to him while wearing equipment adding up to 180 ranged attack bonus or over ( crystal bow gives +100 ranged attack bonus on its own). The bonuses from a toxic blowpipe does not count.

cryptic.clue: She's small but can build both literally and figuratively.
cryptic.solution: Speak to Lovada south of the Lovakengj blast mine.

cryptic.clue: Shhhh!
cryptic.solution: Speak to Logosia in the Arceuus Library's ground floor.

cryptic.clue: Show this to Sherlock.
cryptic.solution: Sherlock can be found south of Seers' Village. Players will have to perform one of the Sherlock tasks in order to complete this challenge.

cryptic.clue: South of a river in a town surrounded by the undead, what lies beneath the furnace?
cryptic.solution: Dig in front of the Shilo Village furnace.

cryptic.clue: The far north eastern corner where 1 of 4 was defeated, the shadows still linger.
cryptic.solution: Dig on the north-eastern-most corner of the Shadow Dungeon. Bring a ring of visibility or a ring of shadows.

cryptic.clue: This place sure is a mess.
cryptic.solution: Ewesey is located in the Hosidius mess hall.

cryptic.clue: Under a giant robotic bird that cannot fly.
cryptic.solution: Dig next to the terrorbird display in the south exhibit of Varrock Museum's basement.

cryptic.clue: Where safe to speak, the man who offers the pouch of smallest size wishes to see your alignment.
cryptic.solution: Speak to the Mage of Zamorak in the Zamorakian chapel south of Aubury's Rune Shop in East Varrock while wearing three items aligned to Zamorak.

emote.clue: Blow a raspberry at Aris in her tent. Equip a gold ring and a gold necklace.
emotes: Aris can be found in her tent at Varrock Square.

emote.clue: Bow to Brugsen Bursen at the Grand Exchange.
emotes: Brugsen Bursen is found inside the Grand Exchange.

emote.clue: Cheer at Iffie Nitter. Equip a chef's hat and a red cape.
emotes: Iffie can be found in Thessalia's Fine Clothes store in Varrock.

emote.clue: Clap at Bob's Brilliant Axes. Equip a bronze axe and leather boots.
emotes: Bob's Brilliant Axes is located in south Lumbridge
right outside Lumbridge Castle.

emote.clue: Panic at Al Kharid mine.
emotes: Al Kharid mine is located just north of Al Kharid. The area is quite large
so the step can also be completed at the southern entrance of the mine or standing in the north-western corner outside the mine.

emote.clue: Spin at Flynn's Mace Shop.
emotes: Flynn's Mace Market is located near the north entrance of Falador.

emote.clue: Blow a raspberry at the monkey cage in Ardougne Zoo. Equip a studded leather body, bronze platelegs and a normal staff with no orb.
Blow raspberries outside the entrance to Keep Le Faye. Equip a coif, an iron platebody and leather gloves.
emotes: Keep Le Faye can be found south of Seers' Village
and can be easily reached by using Camelot Teleport then running south
or by using fairy ring code BLR

emote.clue: Bow in the office of the Emir's Arena. Equip an iron chain body, leather chaps and coif.
Bow outside the entrance to the Legends' Guild. Equip iron platelegs, an emerald amulet and an oak longbow.
Cheer at the Druids' Circle. Equip a blue wizard hat, a bronze two-handed sword and HAM boots.
Cheer at the games room. Have nothing equipped at all when you do.
emotes: The basement of the Burthorpe Games Room in Burthorpe.

emote.clue: Cheer for the monks at Port Sarim. Equip a coif, steel plateskirt and a sapphire necklace.
emotes: Requires 20 Ranged for equipping the coif.

emote.clue: Clap in the main exam room in the Exam Centre. Equip a white apron, green gnome boots and leather gloves.
emotes: The Exam Centre is located east of Varrock
just south of the Digsite.

emote.clue: Clap on the causeway to the Wizards' Tower. Equip an iron medium helmet, emerald ring and a white apron.
Clap on the top level of the mill, north of East Ardougne. Equip a blue gnome robe top, HAM robe bottom and an unenchanted tiara.
Dance a jig behind the bar on the Pandemonium. Equip a right eye patch and a bronze scimitar.
Dance a jig by the entrance to the Fishing Guild. Equip an emerald ring, a sapphire amulet, and a bronze chain body.
Dance at the crossroads north of Draynor. Equip an iron chain body, a sapphire ring and a longbow.
Dance at the entrance to the Grand Exchange. Equip a pink skirt, pink robe top and a body tiara.
emotes: Important note: Pink skirt from Varrock
Pink robe top from Gnome Stronghold. Be aware of this!

emote.clue: Dance in the Party Room. Equip a steel full helmet, steel platebody and an iron plateskirt.
Dance in the shack in Lumbridge Swamp. Equip a bronze dagger, iron full helmet and a gold ring.
emotes: This step provides players who have completed the Lumbridge and Draynor elite diary an option to enter the shed. Those players are otherwise unable to enter without teleporting to Zanaris.

emote.clue: Do a jig in Varrock's rune store. Equip an air tiara and a staff of water.
Headbang in the mine north of Al Kharid. Equip a desert shirt, leather gloves and leather boots.
Jump for joy at the beehives. Equip a desert shirt, green gnome robe bottoms and a steel axe.
emotes: Beehives are located west of Catherby.

emote.clue: Laugh at the crossroads south of the Sinclair mansion. Equip a cowl, a blue wizard robe top and an iron scimitar.
Panic in the Limestone Mine. Equip bronze platelegs, a steel pickaxe and a steel medium helmet.
emotes: Located east of the Lumber Yard.

emote.clue: Panic on the pier where you catch the Fishing trawler. Have nothing equipped at all when you do.
emotes: Northernmost dock in Port Khazard
east of the Fight Arena.

emote.clue: Shrug in the mine near Rimmington. Equip a gold necklace, a gold ring and a bronze spear.
Spin at the crossroads north of Rimmington. Equip a green gnome hat, cream gnome top and leather chaps.
Spin in Draynor Manor by the fountain. Equip an iron platebody, studded leather chaps and a bronze full helmet.
Spin in the Varrock Castle courtyard. Equip a black axe, a coif and a ruby ring.
Think in middle of the wheat field by the Lumbridge mill. Equip a blue gnome robetop, a turquoise gnome robe bottom and an oak shortbow.
Wave along the south fence of the Lumber Yard. Equip a hard leather body, leather chaps and a bronze axe.
Wave in the Falador gem store. Equip a Mithril pickaxe, Black platebody and an Iron Kiteshield.
Wave on Mudskipper Point. Equip a black cape, leather chaps and a steel mace.
emotes: The fairy ring code AIQ teleports you to the correct spot.

emote.clue: Yawn in Draynor Marketplace. Equip studded leather chaps, an iron kiteshield and a steel longsword.
Yawn in the Fortis Grand Museum. Equip an emerald necklace, blue skirt, and turquoise gnome robe top.
Yawn in the Varrock library. Equip a green gnome robe top, HAM robe bottom and an iron warhammer.
Beckon in Tai Bwo Wannai. Clap before you talk to me. Equip green d'hide chaps, a ring of dueling and a mithril med helm.
emotes: Do the emotes within the barricaded part of Tai Bwo Wannai.

emote.clue: Beckon in the Digsite, near the eastern winch. Bow before you talk to me. Equip a green hat, snakeskin boots and an iron pickaxe.
Beckon in the Shayzien Combat Ring. Show your anger before you talk to me. Equip an adamant platebody, adamant full helm and adamant platelegs.
emotes: The Combat Ring of Shayzien is located south-east of the bank. Other versions of the adamant platebody and legs do not work.

emote.clue: Cheer in the Barbarian Agility Arena. Headbang before you talk to me. Equip a steel platebody, maple shortbow and a Wilderness cape.
emotes: Requires miniquest Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl and 30 in Ranged (to wield the maple shortbow) While level 35 Agility is required to enter the arena itself
the clue can be completed without it. Upon entering from the gate
walk into the building located to the south. Inside the building
walk to the most south-eastern corner
and do the emote. The Team cape i
Team cape x and Team cape zero can also be used.

emote.clue: Cheer in the Edgeville general store. Dance before you talk to me. Equip a brown apron, leather boots and leather gloves.
Cheer in the Ogre Pen in the Training Camp. Show you are angry before you talk to me. Equip a green d'hide body and chaps and a steel square shield.
emotes: Access to the Combat Training Camp requires completion of the Biohazard quest. Equipping the green d'hide body requires completion of Dragon Slayer I.

emote.clue: Clap in Seers court house. Spin before you talk to me. Equip an adamant halberd, blue mystic robe bottom and a diamond ring.
emotes: Ironman accounts must start the Regicide quest to purchase an adamant halberd. These can also be obtained as loot from Bull sharks .

emote.clue: Clap your hands north of Mount Karuulm. Spin before you talk to me. Equip an adamant warhammer, mithril boots and a ring of life.
emotes: Fairy ring code CIR or Battlefront teleport
and run to the northern end of the volcano.

emote.clue: Cry in the Catherby Ranging shop. Bow before you talk to me. Equip blue gnome boots, a hard leather body and an unblessed silver sickle.
Cry in the Draynor Village jail. Jump for joy before you talk to me. Equip an adamant sword, a sapphire amulet and an adamant plateskirt.
Cry on the shore of Catherby beach. Laugh before you talk to me. Equip an adamant sq shield, a bone dagger and mithril platebody.
Cry on top of the western tree in the Gnome Agility Arena. Indicate 'no' before you talk to me. Equip a steel kiteshield, ring of forging, and green d'hide chaps.
Dance a jig under Shantay's Awning. Bow before you talk to me. Equip a bruise blue snelm, an air staff and a bronze square shield.
emotes: South of Al Kharid
Shantay Pass. Only the pointed blue snelm will work!

emote.clue: Dance in the centre of Canifis. Bow before you talk to me. Equip a green gnome robe top, mithril platelegs and an iron two-handed sword.
Dance in the dark caves beneath Lumbridge Swamp. Blow a kiss before you talk to me. Equip an air staff, bronze full helm and an amulet of power.
emotes: You need a rope to enter this cave the first time. You always need a light source in the caves
except when you have built the fire of eternal light. If using the Lumbridge Castle basement to access the caves via the northern entrance
you will need to step one square south of the cave entrance as the square next to the entrance does not work when you dance. Two STASH units are provided
one near each of the main entrances. Building one of them will automatically build the other one.

emote.clue: Jump for Joy in the mine near the Twilight Temple. Bow before you talk to me. Equip a maple longbow, a ruby amulet and some steel platelegs.
emotes: Pendant of ates teleport to Twilight Temple
or Quetzal Transport System to Salvager Overlook and head east towards the East Salvager Overlook mine.

emote.clue: Jump for joy in the TzHaar sword shop. Shrug before you talk to me. Equip a steel longsword, blue d'hide body and blue mystic gloves.
emotes: BLP

emote.clue: Jump for joy in Yanille bank. Dance a jig before you talk to me. Equip a brown apron, adamantite medium helm and snakeskin chaps.
Nod your head where the River Ortus meets the Proudspire. Indicate 'no' before you talk to me. Equip a blue wizard hat, a blue wizard robe and wear nothing on your legs.
emotes: Pendant of ates teleport to Twilight Temple
then run north-west past the Tower of Ascension to the end of the River Ortus.

emote.clue: Panic by the mausoleum in Morytania. Wave before you speak to me. Equip a mithril plate skirt[sic], maple longbow and no boots.
emotes: Starting Creature of Fenkenstrain quest is required to access the area. Go through the tombstone south-east of Fenkenstrain's Castle to reach the Experiment cave. If the quest is not completed
kill an Experiment for a key. Go north-west through the gate (unlocked if the quest has been completed) and up the ladder. Remember
no boots. After the quest you can repair the bridge to make a shortcut you can cross if you have 69 Agility.

emote.clue: Shrug in Catherby bank. Yawn before you talk to me. Equip a maple longbow, green d'hide chaps and an iron med helm.
Spin on the bridge by the Barbarian Village. Salute before you talk to me. Equip purple gloves, a steel kiteshield and a mithril full helm.
Think in the centre of the Observatory. Spin before you talk to me. Equip a mithril chainbody, green dragonhide chaps and a ruby amulet.
emotes: Players who have completed the Observatory Quest with level 23 Agility
24 Ranged and 28 Strength may use a shortcut by using the grapple-able rock just outside the observatory; players need only bring a crossbow and grapple for the first trip. Otherwise
players must navigate through the Observatory Dungeon to reach this clue.

emote.clue: Yawn in the Castle Wars lobby. Shrug before you talk to me. Equip a ruby amulet, a mithril scimitar and a Wilderness cape.
emotes: The Team cape i
Team cape x and Team cape zero can also be used.

emote.clue: Yawn in the centre of Arceuus library. Nod your head before you talk to me. Equip blue dragonhide vambraces, adamant boots and an adamant dagger.
emotes: The fairy ring code CIS teleports you north of the library. Use the "yes" emote to nod your head. Note: You cannot get this step playing Ironman Mode.[1]

emote.clue: Beckon on the east coast of the Kharazi Jungle. Beware of double agents! Equip any vestment stole and a heraldic rune shield.
emotes: Must have started Legends' Quest. Equipping the stole requires level 60 Prayer. The heraldic crest rune kiteshields do not work. Note: An axe and machete are required to enter the Kharazi Jungle
or players may also use two vines on either side of the jungle that require 79 Agility.

emote.clue: Blow a kiss between the tables in Shilo Village bank. Beware of double agents! Equip a blue mystic hat, bone spear and rune platebody.
emotes: Shilo Village is a village on Karamja. It is only accessible to players that have completed the Shilo Village quest. The gilded and trimmed versions of the rune platebody do not work.

emote.clue: Blow a raspberry in the Fishing Guild bank. Beware of double agents! Equip an elemental shield, blue d'hide chaps and a rune warhammer.
emotes: Requires Elemental Workshop I and 68 fishing to enter the guild (boost allowed)

emote.clue: Bow at the top of the lighthouse. Beware of double agents! Equip a blue d'hide body, blue d'hide vambraces and no jewellery.
emotes: Must have repaired the Lighthouse lighting mechanism in the Horror from the Deep quest to access. The fairy ring code ALP teleports you right outside the Lighthouse.

emote.clue: Cheer at the top of the agility pyramid. Beware of double agents! Equip a blue mystic robe top, and any rune heraldic shield.
emotes: Requires 30 Agility to reach the top of the pyramid
40 Magic and 40 Defence to equip items. The player-made heraldic crest rune kiteshields do not work. Only the blue mystic robe top works!

emote.clue: Dance at the cat-doored pyramid in Sophanem. Beware of double agents! Equip a ring of life, an uncharged amulet of glory and an adamant two-handed sword.
emotes: Partial completion of Icthlarin's Little Helper required to access Sophanem. Your amulet of glory must be uncharged in order to work. Amulet of glory (t) does not work for this clue step.

emote.clue: Headbang at the exam centre. Beware of double agents! Equip a mystic fire staff, a diamond bracelet and rune boots.
emotes: The Digsite Exam Centre is located just south of the Digsite.

emote.clue: Jig at Jiggig. Beware of double agents! Equip a rune spear, rune platelegs and any rune heraldic helm.
emotes: South of Castle Wars
talk to the quest starter if you haven't started Zogre Flesh Eaters

and he will grant you access to the location in Jiggig; you need to jig. The gilded and trimmed versions of the rune platelegs do not work. Poisoned versions of the Rune Spear do not work. Note: You need to complete Big Chompy Bird Hunting and Jungle Potion to start Zogre Flesh Eaters.

emote.clue: Laugh in Jokul's tent in the Mountain Camp. Beware of double agents! Equip a rune full helmet, blue d'hide chaps and a fire battlestaff.
emotes: Bring rope if you haven't completed the Mountain Daughter quest. Go up the top path
and use on the boulder (fairy ring code: AJR).

emote.clue: Panic by the pilot on White Wolf Mountain. Beware of double agents! Equip mithril platelegs, a ring of life, and a rune axe.
emotes: Panic by Captain Bleemadge on White Wolf Mountain. Be careful of the aggressive level 73 Big Wolf.

emote.clue: Panic in the heart of the Haunted Woods. Beware of double agents! Have no items equipped when you do.
emotes: The location is east of the Fairy ring ALQ in the Haunted Woods. Players should be careful of the Feral Vampyres summoned by the spider roaming around that area.

emote.clue: Panic on the Wilderness volcano bridge. Beware of double agents! Equip any headband and crozier.
emotes: Required: 60 The Blighted Volcano is located in the north-east corner of the Wilderness. Players should be cautious of player killers and dangerous monsters. A Clue Box may also be helpful.

emote.clue: Panic outside the Twilight Temple. Beware of double agents! Equip a rune longsword, rune platebody and a rune plateskirt.
emotes: Twilight Temple is located in Varlamore
which is accessible upon completion of Children of the Sun. Beware of Twilight Emissaries
ranging from level 34 to 117 (aggressive
multi-combat).

emote.clue: Salute in the banana plantation. Beware of double agents! Equip a diamond ring, amulet of power, and nothing on your chest and legs.
emotes: Players can perform the emote near the STASH (if they have built one) within the Musa Point banana plantation.

emote.clue: Salute in the centre of the mess hall. Beware of double agents! Equip a rune halberd, rune platebody and an amulet of strength.
emotes: Kourend Castle Teleport teleports the player just north of the Mess. Salute in the centre of the kitchen rather than the dining room.

emote.clue: Shrug in the woods east of the Level 19 Wilderness Obelisk. Beware of double agents! Equip rune platelegs, an iron platebody and blue d'hide vambraces.
emotes: Players should be cautious of player killers. The step location is in level 19 Wilderness. You can bring a teleport as it is below level 20 Wilderness; however
be wary of Tele Block.

emote.clue: Yawn in the rogues' general store. Beware of double agents! Equip an adamant square shield, blue dragon vambraces and a rune pickaxe.
emotes: Bandit Camp general store in level 23 Wilderness
north of the Dark Warriors' Fortress. The burning amulet can take you there
but be wary of player killers and level 130 Bandits.

emote.clue: Blow a kiss in the heart of the lava maze. Equip black d'hide chaps, a spotted cape and a rolling pin.
emotes: Perform the emote at the centre of the Lava Maze
next to entrance of the Lava Maze Dungeon. A slashing weapon or knife is required to navigate the maze.

emote.clue: Bow on the ground floor of the Legend's[sic] guild. Equip Legend's[sic] cape, a dragon battleaxe and an amulet of glory.
emotes: Players require completion of Legends' Quest to access the Legends' Guild. An amulet of glory with any amount of charges or an amulet of eternal glory will work.

emote.clue: Bow upstairs in the Edgeville Monastery. Equip a completed prayer book.
emotes: Players require a Prayer level of 31 to enter the Edgeville Monastery. Any completed god book is usable for this clue.

emote.clue: Bow within the temple in Civitas illa Fortis. Equip any piece of sunfire fanatic armour.
emotes: The temple is found near the southern entrance to Civitas illa Fortis.

emote.clue: Cheer in the Shadow dungeon. Equip a rune crossbow, climbing boots and any mitre.
emotes: Requires partial completion of Desert Treasure I. Bring a ring of visibility or a ring of shadows. The ornamental rune crossbow also works. Climbing boots (g) do not work. The Egg priest mitre does not work.

emote.clue: Dance on the Fishing Platform. Equip barrows gloves, an amulet of glory and a dragon med helm.
emotes: Barrows gloves require full completion of Recipe for Disaster to equip. An amulet of glory with any amount of charges or an amulet of eternal glory will work.

emote.clue: Do the crab dance by the monument on Wintumber Island. Equip a crab helmet and a crab claw.
emotes: Requires level 63 sailing to reach Wintumber Island.

emote.clue: Headbang at the top of the Slayer Tower. Equip a seercull, a combat bracelet, and helm of neitiznot.
emotes: Equipping the Helm of Neitiznot requires completion of The Fremennik Isles. If taking shortcuts to the top
it is advised to have a nosepeg or Slayer helmet in order to avoid stat draining from aberrant spectres.

emote.clue: Headbang in the Fight Arena pub. Equip a pirate bandana, a dragonstone necklace and a magic longbow.
emotes: Near Nightmare Zone. On the west side of the fight arena.

emote.clue: Jump for joy at the Neitiznot rune rock. Equip rune boots, a proselyte hauberk and a dragonstone ring.
emotes: Players must complete Fremennik Isles in order to access the Neitiznot runite rock. The Slug Menace must be completed in order to equip the Prostelyte Hauberk.

emote.clue: Jump for joy in the Ancient Cavern. Equip a granite shield, splitbark body, and any rune heraldic helm.
emotes: Players need to have started the Barbarian Training miniquest in order to enter the caverns. The rune heraldic helm is the rune helm from Treasure Trails
not the painted heraldic armour from player-owned houses!

emote.clue: Laugh by the fountain of heroes. Equip splitbark legs, dragon boots and a rune longsword.
emotes: Completion of Heroes' Quest is required. The gilded dragon boots
Dragon boots (cr)
primordial boots
Avernic treads (pr)
Avernic treads (pr)(et)
Avernic treads (pr)(pe)
Avernic treads (max) also work.

emote.clue: Laugh in front of the gem store in Ardougne market. Equip a Castle wars bracelet, a dragonstone amulet and a ring of forging.
Panic at the area flowers meet snow. Equip blue d'hide vambraces, a dragon spear and a rune plateskirt.
emotes: Panic by the Trollweiss flowers after sledding down Trollweiss Mountain. Make sure to bring a sled
otherwise you won't be able to complete the step. The poisoned dragon spear or rune plateskirt versions do not work.

emote.clue: Salute by the Charcoal Burners. Equip a Farmer's strawhat, Shayzien body (5), and Pyromancer robes.
emotes: Salute by the charcoal furnace south of Hosidius

emote.clue: Salute in the warriors' guild bank. Equip only a black salamander.
emotes: Black salamanders require 70 Ranged
70 Magic
and 70 Attack to equip.

emote.clue: Shrug in the Shayzien war tent. Equip a blue mystic robe bottom, a rune kiteshield and any bob shirt.
emotes: The War Tent is the large tent in the western end of the Shayzien Encampment. (South of the bank chest.)

emote.clue: Spin in West Ardougne Church. Equip a dragon spear and red d'hide chaps.
Yawn at the top of Trollheim. Equip a lava battlestaff, black d'hide vambraces and a mind shield.
emotes: Requires Elemental Workshop I and II and parts of Troll Stronghold completed. An ornamental lava battlestaff can be used.

emote.clue: Beckon by a collection of crystalline maple trees. Beware of double agents! Equip Bryophyta's staff and a nature tiara.
emotes: The maple trees are found within the town of Gwenith
which requires completion of Song of the Elves to reach. Bryophyta's staff can either be uncharged or charged; both can be used.

emote.clue: Blow a kiss outside K'ril Tsutsaroth's chamber. Beware of double agents! Equip a Zamorak full helm and the Shadow sword.
emotes: 70 Hitpoints is required to access this part of the God Wars Dungeon. Completion of The General's Shadow miniquest is required to obtain the Shadow sword.

emote.clue: Blow a raspberry at the bank of the Warrior's[sic] guild. Beware of double agents! Equip a dragon battleaxe, a slayer helm of any kind and a dragon defender or avernic defender.
emotes: Any variant of Slayer helmet is acceptable. A total of 130 levels in Attack and Strength or level 99 in either skill is required to enter the guild. A trimmed dragon or avernic defender can be used.

emote.clue: Bow in front of the cave on Brittle Isle. Beware of double agents! Equip a medallion of the deep and a rosewood blowpipe.
